_instruction: Use this matrix as the writing workspace. One row = one paper-section evidence unit. Keep it claim-oriented and section-scoped.

rounds.round1: Build broad evidence pool (150+ search -> dedupe -> index -> matrix bootstrap)
rounds.round2: Bind evidence to section claims and resolve contradictions
rounds.round3: Refresh critical claims with newest papers and mark updated_in_round3=true

example_entry.title: External validation of multimodal prediction
example_entry.key_finding: Model retained calibration in external cohort
